mentions.note: Quality company with great yield but at 52-week high ahead of earnings; wait for post-earnings dip to buy.

Diversified pipeline (30% North American crude, 20% US nat gas). 30% stake in West Coast LNG terminal entering 2027 service—fastest route to Asia (no Panama Canal). 5.3% yield. Elite Eight income + growth stock.
Right here at current levels is excellent entry; buy and hope for pullback; mentioned in book; for all investors, not just retirees.
